specific_mechanism: Lichen succession: algae provide carbohydrate, fungus provides structure; symbiosis co-evolves with substrate, weathering, and competing lichens
llm_application: LLM training-data symbiosis: synthetic-data generator (carbohydrate) symbiosis with critic-model (structure); co-evolves with adversarial benchmark.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes lichenology adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
